item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Well written, funky idea, good execution, lots of laser vomit. +1.

item.title: Junior Staff - Site Criticism
item.content:encoded:
This one didn’t really do it for me.

+ Tanhony rambles
- TURN IT OFF

A few things that jumped out at me:

Testing with SCP-4652 is only to be carried out with explicit approval from 2 Level 4 personnel.

Forgive me if I’m wrong here, but I think this should be ‘two Level 4 personnel’.

The personnel drinking SCP-4652-1 is to be restrained

‘Is’ should be ‘are’ here as well, I’m pretty sure.

After drinking the entire contents of SCP-4652, Officer West leaned back and eructated. The ensuing beam of plasma lasted 17 seconds, alerting all personnel on the surface and more than 100 civilians.

The Shin Gojira image this put in my head is wonderful, though.

I realize it’s a little hypocritical of me to say this, as it’s a device I’ve used in a few past articles, but the whole ‘anomaly is delivered to the Foundation with a mysterious note’ is a little played out for me. The note itself feels like it could be written by any GoI, really - the ‘loyal customers’ things been done a few times with Wondertainment - and it doesn’t really make me interested in who Don Z is or their motivations for sending the anomaly.

The article doesn’t really do much to go beyond the original premise of the laser burping - that isn't to say that keeping the article focused like that is necessarily bad, mind you - but it just didn’t really grab me with that initial premise, and the test logs didn’t do enough to build on it for me.

-1 for now.

Disclaimer: Opinions expressed in this review do not reflect the opinions of SCP Wiki staff as a whole. Please respond to Tanhony or contact the captain of the Site Criticism Team, SoullessSingularity, for any questions or concerns relating to this review.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My apologies for not reviewing it like I said I would, I seriously owe you something. For one, take my upvote :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: A nice call-back to the earlier, less serious skips of the past. +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This SCP made me remember that I went most of my adult life thinking that everyone could force themselves to burp, and that it shocked me to learn that this was not the case.

+1, sometimes you just need a nice burp laser

item.title: Some skips are horrific monsters...
item.content:encoded:
This one ain't it.

Have a skip about burping lasers.

Image from ESO, link here: https://www.flickr.com/photos/esoastronomy/5158684154 The image was cropped, and the beam made more pale to resemble moonlight. It's under CC BY 2.0 licensing, which says I need to say all that.

Thanks to everyone who reviewed it!
